race.description: Geraldton & Champion Bay Freemason Lodges Handicap
race.comment: SCURGEOFTHEWEST (1) flew home from the tail to win by 0.7L last start, making it four wins in a row. He drops in weight here as he returns to a ratings race and the form out of his last start has been impressive. Can continue his winning ways. KENTUCKY BLUE (6) was strong from the front over 1417m last start at this track and the inside draw should see him close to the speed once again. He drops 3kg for this event and See knows him well. He appears the main danger. LET'S SEA (10) got the job done in a photo finish last start when the race favourite. He's likely to get back from the draw which is the query, but he remains down in the weights and he can feature in the finish once again. THE RUSH (5) has to be included after a good win last time out. BUTTERFLYROCK (3) comes back in trip today and is in the mix on her best form.
